Meaning.En: A medical condition caused by interrupted blood supply to the brain, leading to brain cell damage.
Meaning.Example: He was rushed to the hospital after suffering a stroke.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tình huống cấp cứu khi người bệnh bị đột quỵ.
Situation.En: Describes an emergency situation when a patient suffers a stroke.

Meaning.Vi: V cú đánh (trong thể thao, vẽ, viết)
Meaning.En: A single movement of hitting or drawing something, especially with a hand, pen, or brush.
Meaning.Example: She executed a perfect backhand stroke in the tennis match.

Situation.Vi: Hành động đánh bóng trong tennis hoặc bơi lội.
Situation.En: The action of hitting a ball in tennis or moving the arm in swimming.

Meaning.Vi: V cú chạm nhẹ, vỗ nhẹ
Meaning.En: A light tap or touch, often conveying affection or emphasis.
Meaning.Example: He gave her hand a gentle stroke to comfort her.

Situation.Vi: Hành động vuốt nhẹ để an ủi hoặc thể hiện tình cảm.
Situation.En: The act of gently touching or stroking to comfort or show affection.

Meaning.En: To make a single movement of hitting, drawing, or touching lightly.
Meaning.Example: She stroked the cat’s fur gently.

Situation.Vi: Hành động vuốt ve vật nuôi hoặc vẽ nét bút.
Situation.En: The act of petting an animal or making a single drawing movement.
